A Digital Supply Chain for Web Assets

Web development tools for the many hats you wear.

Contribute View Projects

The Three Stages

⚙

Develop

Create enterprise-grade, functional web assets and development tools. Secure, scalable, and stable.

Active
🔍

Discover

A central catalog to find, explore, and understand available web assets and development tools across the enterprise.

In Progress
📦

Deliver

Standardized delivery of web assets in a variety of methods — beyond the NPM ecosystem.

Coming Soon

Why Chapeaux?

Framework Agnostic

Reduces reliance on external libraries and frameworks. Your tools work regardless of the stack.

Enterprise Ready

Built for scale with security, stability, and compliance as first-class concerns.

Developer Productivity

Reusable tools and assets that let teams focus on solving problems, not reinventing solutions.

Open Source

Community-driven development with open governance and transparent decision-making.

Latest Updates

CPX Store as a Reactive State Layer for Solid Pod Applications

2026-05-07

Solid pods give users data sovereignty. CPX Store gives applications reactive state. The new SolidTransport bridges them — the collab plugin's SyncTransport interface, pointed at a pod resource, with W3C Solid Notifications for real-time updates.

Every Geoff Site Is Now an AI-Queryable Knowledge Base

2026-05-07

Geoff sites can now expose their RDF knowledge graph to AI agents via MCP manifests and a WASM SPARQL engine. Zero server cost, zero API to maintain — agents download the engine and data, then query locally.

Geoff Case Study: Red Hat Design System

2026-05-03

How we migrated the Red Hat Design System documentation site — 711 pages, 46 web components, and 500+ design tokens — from Eleventy to Geoff. SPARQL-driven navigation, Lit SSR, RDFa output, and client-side search powered by the same Oxigraph engine.

View all posts →
